switch.name: systems/cws/rcs-jet
switch.test: systems/cws/jet-fail-f1 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-f2 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-f3 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-f4 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-f5 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-l1 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-l2 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-l3 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-l4 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-l5 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-r1 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-r2 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-r3 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-r4 GT 0.0 systems/cws/jet-fail-r5 GT 0.0

switch.name: systems/cws/gpc-hardware-fault
switch.test: systems/failures/dps/gpc-1-condition EQ 0.0 systems/failures/dps/gpc-2-condition EQ 0.0 systems/failures/dps/gpc-3-condition EQ 0.0 systems/failures/dps/gpc-4-condition EQ 0.0 systems/failures/dps/gpc-5-condition EQ 0.0

switch.name: systems/cws/fuel-cell-stack-temp
switch.test: systems/electrical/fc/stack-temperature-K GT 389.7 systems/electrical/fc[1]/stack-temperature-K GT 389.7 systems/electrical/fc[2]/stack-temperature-K GT 389.7 systems/electrical/fc/stack-temperature-K LT 350 systems/electrical/fc[1]/stack-temperature-K LT 350 systems/electrical/fc[2]/stack-temperature-K LT 350

switch.name: systems/cws/fuel-cell-pump
switch.test: systems/failures/fc1-coolant-pump-condition LT 0.8 systems/failures/fc2-coolant-pump-condition LT 0.8 systems/failures/fc3-coolant-pump-condition LT 0.8 systems/electrical/fc/fc-running LT 1.0 systems/electrical/fc[1]/fc-running LT 1.0 systems/electrical/fc[2]/fc-running LT 1.0

switch.name: systems/cws/main-bus-undervolt
switch.test: systems/electrical/bus/voltage LT 26.4 systems/electrical/bus[1]/voltage LT 26.4 systems/electrical/bus[2]/voltage LT 26.4

switch.name: systems/cws/cabin-atm
switch.test: systems/eclss/cabin/air-pressure-psi LT 13.74 systems/eclss/cabin/air-pressure-psi GT 15.53 systems/eclss/cabin/ppo2-psi LT 2.7 systems/eclss/cabin/ppo2-psi GT 3.6

switch.name: systems/cws/avbay-cabin-air
switch.test: systems/eclss/cabin/co2-accumulation-target == 1 systems/eclss/avbay/temperature-K GT 328 systems/eclss/avbay[1]/temperature-K GT 328 systems/eclss/avbay[2]/temperature-K GT 328

switch.name: systems/cws/hyd-press
switch.test: systems/apu/apu/hyd-pressure-psia LT 2400 systems/apu/apu[1]/hyd-pressure-psia LT 2400 systems/apu/apu[2]/hyd-pressure-psia LT 2400

switch.name: systems/cws/mps-hw
switch.test: systems/mps/helium/reg-pressure-psia LT 680.0 systems/mps/helium[1]/reg-pressure-psia LT 680.0 systems/mps/helium[2]/reg-pressure-psia LT 680.0 systems/mps/helium/reg-pressure-psia GT 810.0 systems/mps/helium[1]/reg-pressure-psia GT 810.0 systems/mps/helium[2]/reg-pressure-psia GT 810.0 systems/mps/helium/pressure-psia LT 1150.0 systems/mps/helium[1]/pressure-psia LT 1150.0 systems/mps/helium[2]/pressure-psia LT 1150.0 systems/mps/helium[3]/pressure-psia LT 1150.0

systems/mps/lh2-manifold-pressure-psia GT 65.0 systems/mps/lo2-manifold-pressure-psia GT 249.0
accelerations/a-pilot-y-ft_sec2 LT 16.0

switch.name: systems/cws/backup-cw-conditions
switch.test: systems/cws/rcs-jet EQ 1.0 systems/cws/fwd-rcs EQ 1.0 systems/cws/left-rcs EQ 1.0 systems/cws/right-rcs EQ 1.0 systems/cws/ac-voltage EQ 1.0 systems/cws/air-data EQ 1.0 systems/cws/imu-dlma EQ 1.0 systems/mps/number-engines-operational LT 3.0 systems/electrical/fc/reactant-valve-status LT 1.0 systems/electrical/fc[1]/reactant-valve-status LT 1.0 systems/electrical/fc[2]/reactant-valve-status LT 1.0 systems/failures/fc1-coolant-pump-condition EQ 0.0 systems/failures/fc2-coolant-pump-condition EQ 0.0 systems/failures/fc3-coolant-pump-condition EQ 0.0 systems/electrical/bus/voltage LT 26.4 systems/electrical/bus[1]/voltage LT 26.4 systems/electrical/bus[2]/voltage LT 26.4 systems/mps/helium/pressure-psia LT 1150.0 systems/mps/helium[1]/pressure-psia LT 1150.0 systems/mps/helium[2]/pressure-psia LT 1150.0 systems/mps/helium[3]/pressure-psia LT 1150.0 systems/mps/lh2-manifold-pressure-psia GT 65 systems/mps/lo2-manifold-pressure-psia GT 249
